questions.question: Paul tells the Corinthians to do what to see if they are in the faith?
How many times was Paul planning to visit Corinth when he wrote this?
Paul closes this letter with a blessing mentioning the grace of Christ, the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit.
The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy _____ be with you all.
_____ yourselves, whether you are in the faith. Test your own selves.
